query:
-- 1. 查询雨欣 林的用户信息
SELECT 
  u.id as userId,
  u.name as userName,
  u.phone as userPhone,
  u.isActive as userIsActive
FROM users u
WHERE u.phone = '13200003';

-- 2. 查询雨欣 林的partners记录
SELECT 
  p.id as partnerId,
  p.userId,
  p.name as partnerName,
  p.phone as partnerPhone,
  p.isActive as partnerIsActive
FROM partners p
WHERE p.userId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE phone = '13200003');

-- 3. 查询雨欣 林的partner_cities记录
SELECT 
  pc.id as partnerCityId,
  pc.partnerId,
  pc.cityId,
  c.name as cityName,
  pc.contractStatus
FROM partner_cities pc
LEFT JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE pc.partnerId IN (
  SELECT p.id FROM partners p
  WHERE p.userId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE phone = '13200003')
);

-- 4. 查询雨欣 林的user_role_cities记录
SELECT 
  urc.id as userRoleCityId,
  urc.userId,
  urc.cityId,
  c.name as cityName,
  urc.roleId
FROM user_role_cities urc
LEFT JOIN cities c ON urc.cityId = c.id
WHERE urc.userId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE phone = '13200003');
